search:Testing Spring Boot + Kafka-Sprin.content:
- Use `mvn clean install` to build your project.
- Add Spring Kafka Test dependency in your `pom.xml`: `<dependency><groupId>org.springframework.kafka</groupId><artifactId>spring-kafka-test</artifactId><scope>test</scope></dependency>`
- For embedded Kafka, use `@EmbeddedKafka` annotation with properties like `brokerProperties`, `partitionsPerTopic`.
- Use `@KafkaListener` for testing listeners.
- Configure `KafkaTemplate` and `DefaultKafkaConsumerFactory` in your test configuration.
- Run tests using `mvn test` to execute the embedded Kafka tests.
- Ensure you have the latest Spring Boot version compatible with your project.
- Key config options include `bootstrap.servers`, `group.id`, and `auto.offset.reset`.
- Use `@TestPropertySource` to override properties for testing.

- Use `mvn clean install` to build your project.
- Add `spring-kafka-test` dependency in your `pom.xml`.
- Configure Kafka properties in `application.properties` or `application.yml`.
- Use `@EmbeddedKafka` annotation for embedded Kafka server setup.
- Annotate test classes with `@SpringBootTest` and `@DirtiesContext(classMode = ClassMode.AFTER_EACH_TEST_METHOD)`.
- Utilize `KafkaTemplate` for sending messages to topics.
- Employ `@KafkaListener` for consuming messages in tests.
- Ensure Kafka server is started before running tests using `@BeforeClass` or `@PostConstruct`.

- Use `docker-compose` to start Kafka server.
- For integration tests, use `EmbeddedKafka`.
- Key config options for Kafka Streams include `bootstrap.servers`, `application.id`, and `default.key.serde`.
- Latest version of Apache Kafka is 3.0.0 (as of my last update).
- Use `mvn test` to run unit tests.
- For testing with Spark and Kafka, ensure Spark and Kafka versions are compatible.
- Example CLI command for starting Kafka server: `docker-compose up -d kafka`.
- Key config options for Spring Cloud Stream include `spring.cloud.stream.bindings.input.destination`, `spring.cloud.stream.bindings.output.destination`, and `spring.cloud.stream.kafka.binder.configuration.bootstrap.servers`.

- Use `mvn clean install` to run tests.
- Ensure Kafka and Zookeeper are running locally or use Docker containers.
- For integration testing, use `@SpringBootTest` with `@EmbeddedKafka`.
- Key config options include `bootstrap.servers`, `key.deserializer`, and `value.deserializer`.
- Latest versions can be found on Maven Central for Kafka Streams and Spring Boot.
